style_name: Chromatic Fisheye Orbit Pop Poster Style
style_summary: A high-key pop poster system built from extreme fisheye photography, a convex glass-dome center, oversized orbiting typography, hot red-magenta-orange letter fills, aqua chromatic light arcs, and light analog print texture.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main person, duo, small crew, performer, maker, athlete, courier, scientist, chef, or product model
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: leaning over a fisheye lens, crouching inside a circular dome, looking down toward camera, reaching across frame, presenting a prop, or sitting in a compressed lens bubble
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: featured object, tool, instrument, product, bag, scooter, plant module, cooler, synth, sports gear, or food item
environment_variables.LOCATION: clean studio, greenhouse lab, indoor market, sports court, workshop, museum atrium, transit hall, or bright exhibition space
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: white negative space, circular glass distortion, cyan light streaks, faint radial smears, cropped typography fragments, small caption block, prism reflections, or color bleed
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: short headline or event title, usually 1 to 3 words, set as huge warped orbiting type
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: small date line, venue note, issue code, route note, product edition, or editorial caption
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: thin cyan arc, prism slash, small sparkle, curved underline, tiny divider, or chrome-like lens glint
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: saturated fashion layers, translucent jacket, glossy sportswear, feathered texture, oversized pants, clean utility uniform, or color-blocked editorial styling

prompt_template:
Create an image in chromatic-fisheye-orbit-pop-poster-style.

Aspect ratio: {ASPECT_RATIO}.

Scene: {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION}, featuring {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}, in {LOCATION}. Include {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Style the subject with {WARDROBE_STYLE}.

Photography: build a finished high-key pop culture poster, not a sketch. Use an extreme fisheye or convex glass-dome viewpoint from below, with the subject centered inside a circular lens bubble. Keep people, props, hair, fabric, and hands photographic and realistic while allowing wide-angle edge distortion.

Layout: keep the surrounding field mostly warm off-white and pale grey so the graphic system has open space. Hold the subject in a central circular dome and let the composition feel off-axis, kinetic, and orbiting without cluttering the center.

Typography: set "{MAIN_TEXT}" as huge heavy display typography warped around the circular lens. Crop the headline at multiple frame edges and fill the letters with hot vermilion, orange, red, and fluorescent magenta ink texture. Add "{SECONDARY_TEXT}" only as a small red editorial caption block in a quiet corner.

Graphic system: include {ACCENT_SYMBOL}, aqua/cyan light arcs, prism smears, faint chromatic aberration, radial motion blur near the rim, subtle analog grain, screenprint speckle, and slight color bleed. The result should feel like a contemporary music, fashion, or culture campaign viewed through a warped circular lens.

Avoid: watermarks, usernames, creator IDs, QR codes, platform logos, app interface marks, copied reference people, copied event text, copied venue text, copied exact pose, exact YOASOBI text, exact anniversary wording, long paragraph text, tiny crowded text, flat vector substitutes, SVG look, HTML mockup, canvas drawing, corporate minimalist poster, muted beige-only palette, dark nightclub scene, cyberpunk darkness, luxury studio calm, fake brand logos, distorted unreadable faces, extra limbs, and misshapen hands.
negative_prompt: watermark, username, creator ID, QR code, platform logo, app interface, copied reference person, copied reference event text, copied venue, copied exact pose, exact YOASOBI text, exact anniversary wording, long paragraph text, tiny crowded text, flat vector substitute, SVG look, HTML mockup, canvas drawing, corporate minimalist poster, muted beige-only palette, dark nightclub scene, cyberpunk darkness, luxury studio calm, fake brand logo, distorted unreadable faces, extra limbs, misshapen hands

values.SUBJECT: two adult greenhouse researchers
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: leaning over a fisheye lens and presenting a seed capsule
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: clear seed capsule and tiny grow light
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: central convex glass-dome distortion, warm off-white negative space, aqua cyan light arcs, prism smears, and subtle screenprint grain
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: translucent pink and mint utility jackets, oversized soft pants, clean gloves, and realistic photographic faces

values.SUBJECT: adult courier
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: leaning toward the lens while parking a compact scooter
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: pale market shapes inside the circular dome, cropped orbiting type, aqua cyan arcs, prism glints, and screenprint speckle
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: glossy coral and white sportswear with gloves and realistic photographic fabric

values.SUBJECT: two adult relay runners
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: leaning over the lens with a chrome cooler
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: chrome cooler filled with colorful ice cream cups
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: warm off-white field, faint track details, huge orbiting headline type, cyan refraction arcs, prism glints, and color bleed
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: playful strawberry-pink and white training outfits with realistic fabric and faces

values.SUBJECT: electronic musician and sound technician
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: modular synth and glowing patch cables
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: convex glass-dome photo bubble, aqua audio-wave arcs, prism reflections, chromatic aberration, analog grain, and warm off-white negative space
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: saturated magenta sleeves, aqua gloves, black utility pants, and realistic photographic skin, hair, cables, and knobs
